description: Elements for exploring digital networks and virtual worlds. Use for cyberpunk dungeon crawls through computer systems.

descriptionTranslations.en: Elements for exploring digital networks and virtual worlds. Use for cyberpunk dungeon crawls through computer systems.

entries.result: Abstract: The virtual world is abstracted into geometric shapes. All digital elements are represented as abstract forms - a vault may appear as a giant neon square wall

resultTranslations.en: Abstract: The virtual world is abstracted into geometric shapes. All digital elements are represented as abstract forms - a vault may appear as a giant neon square wall

entries.result: Realistic: The virtual world seems like a real world. All digital elements are represented in the context of simulated reality - ICE countermeasures may look like police officers

resultTranslations.en: Realistic: The virtual world seems like a real world. All digital elements are represented in the context of simulated reality - ICE countermeasures may look like police officers

entries.result: Streamway: A conduit in the virtual world, a path along which information flows. Allows you to reach other places, but also where information on the move can be intercepted

resultTranslations.en: Streamway: A conduit in the virtual world, a path along which information flows. Allows you to reach other places, but also where information on the move can be intercepted

entries.result: Vault: A secured area of the network where sensitive information or data is stored. Tough to enter without authorization and attempting to do so is likely to trigger countermeasures

resultTranslations.en: Vault: A secured area of the network where sensitive information or data is stored. Tough to enter without authorization and attempting to do so is likely to trigger countermeasures

entries.result: AI: You have attracted the attention of an administrative AI that manages this network. They do not usually take kindly to intruders, although they may listen to a good argument

resultTranslations.en: AI: You have attracted the attention of an administrative AI that manages this network. They do not usually take kindly to intruders, although they may listen to a good argument

entries.result: Hunter/Killer: A subroutine of Black ICE designed to seek out and destroy intruders in the net. Once they lock on to an intruder they are relentless until the intrusion is over

resultTranslations.en: Hunter/Killer: A subroutine of Black ICE designed to seek out and destroy intruders in the net. Once they lock on to an intruder they are relentless until the intrusion is over

entries.result: ICE: Intrusion Countermeasure Electronics are implanted defenses to trip up, expel, or kill net jackers. Sometimes disguised as enticing Vaults, sometimes triggered by presence in a Streamway

resultTranslations.en: ICE: Intrusion Countermeasure Electronics are implanted defenses to trip up, expel, or kill net jackers. Sometimes disguised as enticing Vaults, sometimes triggered by presence in a Streamway

entries.result: Access Point: A place in the digital world that connects with real world objects - cameras, vehicles, doors, military hardware. May allow the Net Jacker to control something in the real world

resultTranslations.en: Access Point: A place in the digital world that connects with real world objects - cameras, vehicles, doors, military hardware. May allow the Net Jacker to control something in the real world
